name: Transaction Approval Engine
description:
Multi-function transaction authorization engine. Pass a function name, JSON payload, and optional config JSON. Returns a JSON string.

Consolidated functions (4):
• getApprovalChain — Full approval chain + CEO reasons + budget impact + display summary. Input: transaction row with owner_roles, manager limits (pm/em monthly/accumulated), budget figures.
• getApprovalProgress — Status + progress + next step + can-approve gate. Input: approval_steps, completed_steps, rejected_step, auto_approved + approver_id, approver_roles, owner_id, approval_status, project_manager_id, entity_manager_id.
• validateSubmission — Pre-submit validation (errors/warnings/budget check). Input: transaction row fields + budget status/figures + vendor_id.
• getUserPermissions — Edit/delete/cancel permissions + invoice review status. Input: transaction row + user_id, user_roles + responsible_id, responsible_name, invoice_reviewed.

Legacy aliases: canUserApprove → getApprovalProgress (superset), getInvoiceReview → getUserPermissions (superset).
Internal functions also accessible: getRequiredApprovers, getApprovalStatus, getNextPendingStep.
author: JAS
